/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc -march=armv9-a+sve2 -O2 -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wvla -Wformat=2 -Wformat-security -Wstrict-prototypes -Wmissing-prototypes -fstack-protector-strong -g -O0 -g3 -DDEBUG -fno-omit-frame-pointer -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/example_encrypt_decrypt.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/example_encrypt_decrypt.dir/example_encrypt_decrypt.c.o -o ../../bin/example_encrypt_decrypt  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/AMA-Cryptography/AMA-Cryptography/build-aarch64/lib: ../../lib/libama_cryptography.so.3.1.0
